","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Adzz58ETXs5WDdT5wLOJk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/305f8db68ebd4e59acda36c6c0f85c69~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704256&x-signature=oxA%2BgfDudxYwvCAIcIa2jUxfpG0%3D","user_id":"122749206402560","user_name":"北海江永鹏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"122749206402560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7458163551048305688","book_info":{"abstract":"曾有人说过，有一处地方存在着布丁郁金香，全身都是香喷喷烤肉的烤全猪，储存着果汁饮料等喷泉，…………等等。
那是来自于异世界，那是属于美食世界的食材。
一名不小心踩空井盖而穿越到综漫世界的少年，遇上各类少女究竟会碰撞出怎么样的火花？
霞之丘诗羽：你可是我的御用取材“男朋友”哦！
薙切绘里奈：嗯？一颗价值50万円的半熟水煮蛋芒果？买了！
伊露露：可是我的老公！这辈子都逃不掉的那种！
春日野穹：哥哥！你又找那么多坏女人！
……………………
在大家都尊重美食的世界之中，来自于美食世界的食材的降临，究竟会造成怎样的结果？
不知不觉中，立木朝阳发现自己似乎踏上了不一样的道路。
